scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint:check && npm run typecheck
scripts.fix: npm run format && npm run lint && npm run typecheck
scripts.format: prettier --write --cache --log-level warn "**/*.{json,md,css,yml,yaml,html}" && deno fmt --config supabase/functions/deno.json supabase/functions/ --quiet
scripts.format:check: prettier --check --cache --log-level warn "**/*.{json,md,css,yml,yaml,html}" && deno fmt --check --config supabase/functions/deno.json supabase/functions/ --quiet
scripts.lint: expo lint --fix . && for dir in supabase/functions/*/; do [ -f "${dir}index.ts" ] && (cd "$dir" && deno lint --fix --quiet index.ts); done
scripts.lint:check: expo lint . && for dir in supabase/functions/*/; do [ -f "${dir}index.ts" ] && (cd "$dir" && deno lint --quiet index.ts); done
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit && for dir in supabase/functions/*/; do [ -f "${dir}index.ts" ] && (cd "$dir" && deno check --quiet index.ts); done
